title: Inventory Link
description: A datapack that makes all players in the world share the same inventory
body:
DISCLAIMER: the commands used in the datapack are **not** made by me, but by [BlockerLockerYT (click for YouTube video)](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/L9B5HDURruQ); I just put them into a datapack so that people can easily add them to their worlds in just a few clicks and enjoy this fun challenge.

_**Inventory Link**_ is a datapack that does exactly what the name says - it _links the inventories of all players_ on that respective world, so that they all share the exact same inventory at all times. This can make a very nice challenge or twist to an SMP - it can be helpful at times, since you need to do the grind only once for an item and everyone can benefit from it, but this blessing can also turn into a curse, since _**if one player dies or removes an item from their inventory, it gets removed for EVERYONE.
**_

Take note that the datapack might be buggy sometimes, especially if multiple players keep trying to move the same item from one slot to the other - it might cause items to vanish or duplicate

Have fun with this chaotic challenge!
